title: Useful Mobs
description: Adds new features for bats, pigs, polar bears, and squids to give forgotten mobs a new purpose!
body:
# 🐷 Useful Pigs
Pigs will now produce 2 babies instead of one when bred!\
\
While riding a pig, throwing a golden carrot at it will make it sniff up some items. [3.0+]\
These items could be dirt, mushrooms, crops, or even gold!\
Also features an advancement for doing so.

# 🦇 Useful Bats
Throwing a glow berry at a bat will give one nearby mob glowing, helping to find new caves!\
Also features an advancement for doing so.

# 🐻 Useful Polar Bear
Throwing raw salmon at a polar bear will give all nearby players strength!\
Also features an advancement for doing so.

# 🦑 Useful Squids
Glow ink sacs can now be used to craft spectral arrows.\
\
When damaged, squid ink now afflicts players in range with brief blindness. [3.0+]\
More helpfully, glow squid ink gives players brief night vision and glowing! [3.0+]

# ⚙️ Configuration
Use /function usefulmobs:config to enable and disable all\* features! [3.0+]\
\*The spectral arrow crafting recipe cannot be disabled with commands, and must use a separate datapack instead, sorry =(

---
### Note
All mobs that consume items (Bats, Polar Bears, and mounted Pigs) will only consume one at a time, so it is safe to throw a whole stack!
